{{CargoRelic
|name=Snowman Ice Crystal
|class_id=20152
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This clear blue ice crystal is actually the core of a snowman. Whenever it snows in winter, you can put the crystal out one night to gain a living snowman the next morning. But please don't forget to remove the crystal before it melts...
|fame=15
|art=31
|fth=14
|civ=13
|tech=17
|ss1=Per Organ implanted, Snail HP +10<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss2=Per Organ implanted, Snail HP +20<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss3=Per Organ implanted, Snail HP +30<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss4=Per Organ implanted, Snail HP +30<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss7=Per Organ implanted, Snail HP +30<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
